introSection: Tornado was a steel roller coaster located at Parque Grano de Oro in Maracaibo, Zulia, Venezuela.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
This roller coaster was present at Interpark in San Diego, Carabobo, Venezuela from 2004 or earlier until 2009 or 2010. It was relocated to its current position where it opened in 2010 or 2011.

There are two other known Z78 coasters: This may be one of the two coasters listed above, however this is thought to be a third Z78 coaster as it has the more modern style of car.
 * Flying Dutchman at Dorney Park
 * Himalaya at Luneur

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Uses the newer style of cars seen on Zyklon coasters from the 1980s to the mid-90s. Over-the-shoulder restraints.

fullText:
Tornado was a steel roller coaster located at Parque Grano de Oro in Maracaibo, Zulia, Venezuela.

This roller coaster was present at Interpark in San Diego, Carabobo, Venezuela from 2004 or earlier until 2009 or 2010. It was relocated to its current position where it opened in 2010 or 2011.

There are two other known Z78 coasters: This may be one of the two coasters listed above, however this is thought to be a third Z78 coaster as it has the more modern style of car.
 * Flying Dutchman at Dorney Park
 * Himalaya at Luneur



Uses the newer style of cars seen on Zyklon coasters from the 1980s to the mid-90s. Over-the-shoulder restraints.
